mapper.select: SELECT menu_id AS menuId, parent_id AS parentId, route_id AS routeId, menu_name AS menuName, icon, order_num AS orderNum, required_permission AS requiredPermission, required_any_permissions AS requiredAnyPermissions, required_role_keys AS requiredRoleKeys FROM sys_menu WHERE visible = 1 AND status = '0' AND route_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY parent_id ASC, order_num ASC, menu_id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id AS menuId, m.parent_id AS parentId, m.route_id AS routeId, m.menu_name AS menuName, m.icon, m.order_num AS orderNum, m.required_permission AS requiredPermission, m.required_any_permissions AS requiredAnyPermissions, m.required_role_keys AS requiredRoleKeys FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id JOIN sys_menu m ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.visible = 1 AND m.status = '0' AND m.route_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.parent_id ASC, m.order_num ASC, m.menu_id ASC
